messages.content: The meeting covered three items: the Q3 launch timeline was confirmed for September 15, the marketing budget was approved at $50K, and the team agreed to hire two additional engineers by end of month.

context_blocks.content: Meeting Notes 3/10: 1) Q3 product launch confirmed Sept 15. 2) Marketing budget approved: $50,000. 3) Hiring: 2 engineers needed by EOM. Action items assigned.
